description: Complete user registration system with custom HTML form, two-checkbox professional info approach, and backend AJAX handler

pages.name: Register Profile
changes: Created custom HTML registration form (replaces Forminator approach)
Two-checkbox implementation: 'I have a LinkedIn profile' + 'I have a CV to upload'
Conditional field display: LinkedIn URL shows when LinkedIn checkbox checked, CV upload shows when CV checkbox checked
Validation: At least one checkbox must be selected
Navy hero section with white heading
White card form container (800px max-width, 48px padding)
13 form fields: 5 personal info (first, middle, last, email, phone), 2 professional checkboxes + conditional fields, 2 identity docs + conditional residence ID, consent
Custom file upload buttons with navy gradient styling
Filename display after file selection
Trust badges footer (4 SVG icons: Secure, GDPR, Legal, EU Standards)
JavaScript: URL parameter reading, conditional toggles, validation logic

pages.name: Select Role
changes: Role selection page (redirects to /register-profile/ with td_user_role parameter)
Temporary implementation (will be replaced with proper role cards)

pages.name: Help
changes: Help page backup created

pages.name: Log In
changes: Login page backup created

code.purpose: AJAX handler for custom registration form
features: Checks at least one of LinkedIn/CV provided
Uploads files to WordPress media library
Creates WordPress user with role from td_user_role parameter
Sets user status to 'pending' for approval workflow
Stores user meta: middle name, phone, LinkedIn URL, citizenship/residence info, file attachment IDs

changes: Updated role selection logic (temporary)
Theme enhancements for custom forms
Updated footer trust badge pattern
Added custom styles for registration form elements

assets.purpose: Trust badge icons for registration form footer
Forminator form 53 export for reference (not used in production)

changes: Updated from Forminator approach to custom HTML form
Documented two-checkbox implementation (LinkedIn + CV)
Added field specifications with HTML IDs
Documented JavaScript validation logic
Added backend processing workflow (td-registration-handler.php)
Documented database storage strategy (users, user meta, media library)
Added deployment and restoration procedures
Updated status to 'Implemented' and target version to v3.6.4

documentation.purpose: Centralized command reference for common WordPress operations
Quick reference for page ID management
Document page ID dependency problem and solutions

changes: Added new actions to dispatcher registry

database.purpose: Add Profile and Logout menu items

commands: Deploy register-profile page content from restore/pages/register-profile.html
Create production page IDs in PAGE-SYNC-MANIFEST.md
verification: Form displays with hero section and white card container
Check 'I have a LinkedIn profile' → LinkedIn URL field appears
Check 'I have a CV to upload' → CV file upload appears
Validation: Cannot submit without at least one checkbox selected
Submit form → User created with 'pending' status in database
Footer trust badges display correctly (4 SVG icons)

issues_addressed: Forminator form not rendering despite complete setup (tables, posts, metadata)
Forminator requires GUI-based initialization that doesn't work with programmatic creation
Need for custom validation: at least one of LinkedIn OR CV
User registration workflow with 'pending' status for approval
Professional information capture with flexibility (LinkedIn XOR CV)
File upload UI/UX improvements (custom buttons, filename display)
Form structure corruption in previous attempts
JavaScript validation for conditional required fields
future_work: Email notification templates (user confirmation, admin notification)
Admin approval interface for pending registrations
Replace select-role page with proper role card design
Add reCAPTCHA integration for bot protection
Implement email verification before account activation
